title: stylidium junceum
intro: Stylidium junceum, also known as trigger plant, is a species of flowering plant in the family Stylidiaceae. The trigger plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties. The health benefits of the trigger plant include treating wounds, reducing fever, and alleviating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs. In herbal preparations, the trigger plant can be made into a tea or tincture to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
